About Us

Our Story & Mission

Vishambhar Singh Ramkali Mahila Mahavidyalaya is a premier women's college located at Fattepurwa, Maharajpur, Kanpur Nagar, Uttar Pradesh – 209402. Established with the noble vision of providing quality higher education to women in rural and semi-urban areas, the college has been a beacon of knowledge and empowerment.

The college offers Bachelor of Science (B.Sc) programmes and is affiliated with Chhatrapati Shahu Ji Maharaj University (CSJMU), Kanpur. Our dedicated management and committed faculty ensure every student receives the best possible education.

Our mission is to empower women through quality science education, build scientific temper, and develop the leadership qualities that prepare them for a bright, successful future.

🎯

Mission

Accessible, quality science education for women, fostering academic excellence and personal growth.

🌟

Vision

To become the leading women's institution in Kanpur Nagar, producing confident, educated leaders.

💎

Values

Integrity, Excellence, Inclusivity, Empowerment and Service to Society.

Academics

Programmes Offered

3-Year Bachelor of Science programmes affiliated to CSJMU, Kanpur

🔬

B.Sc – PCM

Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics

Duration: 3 Years
Eligibility: 12th PCM
Medium: Hindi / English

🧬

B.Sc – ZBC

Zoology, Botany & Chemistry

Duration: 3 Years
Eligibility: 12th Biology
Medium: Hindi / English

💻

B.Sc – CS

Computer Science, Maths & Stats

Duration: 3 Years
Eligibility: 12th Any
Medium: Hindi / English
